insight: PROTOCOL FAIL with retained exploratory diagnostics. The frozen design prohibited gold content in synthesis, required at least 10/20 gold-clean inputs per accepted candidate, and required raw prompt retention. The executed generator received gold and variant hunks and emitted one targeted scenario per candidate; the report substituted 13/15 aggregate clean scenarios for the per-candidate bar. Ten official-harness-certified patches have retained clean gold-versus-variant divergences under those gold-assisted targeted scenarios. They are exploratory reference-differential witnesses, not protocol-valid gold-blind synthesis or independent semantic adjudication. The two scenario matches are not global equivalence results.
next_action: Treat all 10 rows as exploratory gold-and-variant-assisted reference differentials. Preserve the original hypothesis, audit, and receipt as error evidence; never cite iter195 as PASS, as no-gold synthesis, as 20-input-validated, or as proof that no shipped repository test covers the behavior.
